analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒波動不大，主要關注點在於電動車股的下滑、SpaceX的上市、人工智慧競賽的電力瓶頸、科技公司與加密貨幣企業聯手打擊非法野生動物貿易等新聞。美國股市未來價格下跌，市場等待聯邦儲備委員會關注的通膨率數據公佈。中國深海探索的AI秘密引起市場關注，Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價大幅下跌。

【結語】
投資者們應該保持冷靜，避免被市場情緒所左右。今天的新聞雖然有許多令人關注的議題，但投資者們應該根據自己的投資目標和風險承受能力進行投資決策。投資者們也應該保持多元化的投資組合，避免對任何一隻股票的過度依賴。

【精選個股】
AAPL - 蘋果公司 - 蘋果公司的強大財務能力和市場佔有率使其成為投資者的首選。
MSFT - 微軟公司 - 微軟公司的雲計算業務和人工智慧技術使其成為未來的投資機會。
GOOGL - Alphabet公司 - Alphabet公司的廣告業務和人工智慧技術使其成為投資者的首選。
風險提醒：投資者們應該注意市場的風險和不確定性，投資前應該進行充分的研究和評估。

items.title: Will EV Stocks Make a Comeback in 2026?
items.summary: Five years ago, electric vehicles were the talk of the market. But in the U.S., sales of electric vehicles are falling, and competition is heating up.
items.zh_title: 電動車股是否在2026年會復甦？
items.zh_point: 五年前電動車是市場的話題，但在美國，電動車的銷售量正在下滑，競爭也在加劇。

items.title: It’s SpaceX IPO Day!
items.summary: Now that SpaceX is officially public, it may benefit companies like Alphabet in the long term.
items.zh_title: SpaceX正式上市！
items.zh_point: SpaceX正式成為一家公開上市公司，這可能對像Alphabet等公司在長期來說有利益。

items.title: The AI Arms Race Isn’t About Technology – It’s About Electricity
items.summary: The bottleneck has shifted from chips to power, and one under-the-radar stock just signed a 15-year, $2.6 billion AI lease that proves the trade is real. The market hasn’t priced it yet.
items.zh_title: 人工智慧競賽不是關於技術，而是關於電力
items.zh_point: 人工智慧競賽的瓶頸從晶片轉移到電力，某隱藏在幕後的公司剛剛簽下一份價值 260 億美元的 15 年人工智慧租約，證明這種交易是真實的，但市場還沒有將其定價。

items.title: You Can't Buy Anthropic Stock Yet, but You Can Buy These 4 AI Stocks Instead
items.summary: This group might be the only AI stocks you need.
items.zh_title: 你還不能買 Anthropic 股票，但你可以買這 4 個 AI 股票
items.zh_point: Anthropic 股票尚未上市，但你可以考慮這 4 個與 AI 相關的股票，可能是你所需要的。

items.title: Tech, crypto firms to help tackle illegal wildlife trade
items.summary: To look ⁠for ways to eradicate online listings, including through AI-enabled detection and prevention. Represent a ⁠fifth of the global e-commerce market and 90% of the world's social media users. Vodafone, Vodacom, Safaricom to use ​AI ​in anti-money-laundering and transaction monitoring ​systems across mobile money ‌platform M-Pesa.
items.zh_title: 科技公司與加密貨幣企業聯手打擊非法野生動物貿易
items.zh_point: 科技公司和加密貨幣企業將合作，使用人工智慧（AI）來偵測和防止非法野生動物貿易的網路上市。這些公司代表全球電子商務市場的五分之一和全球社交媒體用戶的九成。Vodafone、Vodacom、Safaricom將在手機錢包平台M-Pesa上使用AI來防止洗錢和監控交易。

items.title: Brent crude slips as Qatar, Pakistan announce 60-day roadmap for U.S.-Iran deal
items.summary: Oil prices fluctuated on Monday after U.S. President Donald Trump threatened renewed military action against Iran.
items.zh_title: 布倫特原油價格下跌，卡塔爾和巴基斯坦宣布與美國和伊朗達成60天路線圖
items.zh_point: 布倫特原油價格在美國總統川普威脅對伊朗採取軍事行動後，於週一波動不定。

items.title: Stock futures fall as oil prices rise; investors await key reading on inflation: Live updates
items.summary: U.S. equity futures were lower on Sunday as Wall Street awaited the release of inflation data that is closely watched by the Federal Reserve.
items.zh_title: 石油價格上漲 美股未來價格下跌 等待通膨率關鍵數據公佈
items.zh_point: 美國股市未來價格下跌，市場等待聯邦儲備委員會關注的通膨率數據公佈。

items.title: Trump threatens Iran with fresh strikes as Vance leads peace talks in Switzerland
items.summary: The talks in Switzerland were the first to be held under the terms of a memorandum of understanding agreed a week ago.
items.zh_title: 特朗普威脅伊朗新一輪攻擊　凡斯領導瑞士和平談判
items.zh_point: 特朗普政府在瑞士與伊朗進行和平談判，但同時也對伊朗發出威脅，表明美國仍然準備好對伊朗進行軍事攻擊。

items.title: Serena Williams to play singles at Wimbledon via wild card
items.summary: Williams, 44, will compete with her sister Venus in doubles, as the pair also accepted a wild-card entry into that draw.
items.zh_title: 塞雷娜·威廉姆斯透過外卡參加溫布頓單打賽事
items.zh_point: 塞雷娜·威廉姆斯將在溫布頓公開賽透過外卡參加單打賽事，同時她與姊姊維納斯也將參加雙打賽事。

items.title: No one wants AI data centers on Earth. Do they make sense in space?
items.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX is betting big on orbital AI data centers. The public doesn't want them on Earth, but the economic case for space-based is questionable.
items.zh_title: 誰也不想要地球上的AI數據中心。它們在太空裡有意義嗎？
items.zh_point: SpaceX的埃隆·馬斯克正大膽投資太空軌道上的AI數據中心，但這項計畫是否經濟合理，仍存疑。

items.title: This bull market isn’t going to end because of Fed rate hikes under Warsh
items.summary: Trump-selected Fed chair Kevin Warsh may hope the threat of rate hikes is enough. But stocks might gain ground if he does. Past rate-hike cycles can be a guide.
items.zh_title: 這波牛市不會因為Warsh的利率上升而結束
items.zh_point: 川普任命的聯邦儲備理事會主席Kevin Warsh可能希望利率上升的威脅足以讓股市下跌，但股市可能會因為他的任命而上漲。過去的利率上升周期可以作為參考。

items.title: The loneliness crisis has gotten so bad that lawmakers are ready to spend millions of dollars to fight it
items.summary: The health damage of loneliness is similar to heavy smoking and obesity
items.zh_title: 孤獨危機已經惡化到法案通過要花上數百萬美元來對抗它
items.zh_point: 孤獨感對健康的傷害與吸菸和肥胖相似，法國政府準備花上數百萬美元來解決這個問題。

items.title: ‘I’ll probably be working until I die’: I’m 60, work as a waiter and have $2,000 in a Roth IRA. What will happen to me?
items.summary: “I’m afraid I’m in a bad place.”
items.zh_title: 六十歲的服務生：我會一直工作到死
items.zh_point: 六十歲的服務生擁有兩千美元的Roth IRA儲蓄，擔心未來的生活狀況。

items.title: I’m spending $170,000 to upgrade my home for my aging parents. Can I get tax breaks?
items.summary: “Given that at least half of the remodeling cost is to accommodate my disabled mother, I’m wondering if some of this may be tax deductible.”
items.zh_title: 為母親改造家園花170,000元，能否申請稅扣？
items.zh_point: 一位父親為了照顧年邁的母親，花費170,000元改造家園，詢問是否可以申請部分稅扣。

items.title: My mother was co-owner of my late grandmother’s bank account. Should she share the money with her siblings?
items.summary: “The will stated that the estate was to be divided equally among her children.”
items.zh_title: 母親與我祖母共同持有銀行帳戶，是否應該與她哥哥姐姐分享遺產？
items.zh_point: 我母親與我祖母共同持有銀行帳戶，遺囑規定遺產應該平均分配給她孩子們，我母親該如何處理這個問題？

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，科技股尤其是人工智慧基礎設施股價大幅下跌，Nvidia股價下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約金屬交易所金、銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約金屬交易所的金價下跌1.4%，銀價下跌2.5%，連續兩天金價下跌，三天內銀價下跌三次。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國深海探索的AI秘密
items.zh_point: 中國一家新興公司宣稱，使用較為普通的芯片，訓練出高性能的AI模型，並且成本相當低廉。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度探索不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價大幅下跌，市場的恐慌情緒可能過於誇大。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與通訊業最新動態
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和通訊業公司在最新的市場報告中獲得關注。

items.title: ROE: High-Quality ETF With Improved Performance, GARP Tilt, A Buy (Rating Upgrade)
items.zh_title: ROE：高質量ETF表現改善，GARP傾向，買入（評級提升）
items.zh_point: ROE ETF的表現有所改善，該基金的投資策略傾向於高成長率和高價值股，評級被提升為買入。

items.title: JETS: Taking Flight Amid Lower Oil, But Skies Ahead Not Yet Clear
items.zh_title: JETS: 在油價下降下起飛，但未來天氣不明朗
items.zh_point: 油價下跌對航空業的影響正在逐漸顯現，但仍有許多未知的風險和挑戰需要航空公司面對。

items.title: 3 Stocks To Play The AI And Data Center Boom
items.zh_title: AI與數據中心熱潮下的3個股票
items.zh_point: AI技術和數據中心建設的快速發展，正吸引投資者的關注。以下三個股票被視為能夠乘風破浪，分享這波熱潮的機會。

items.title: Conagra Brands: The Market Is Pricing In More Fear Than The Fundamentals Justify
items.zh_title: 康納格蘭德：市場正將恐懼的預期過度計入股價
items.zh_point: 康納格蘭德的股價可能被市場過度恐懼的預期所壓低，實際上公司的財務狀況並不那麼糟糕。

items.title: FTHI: For Investors Prioritizing Income Above All (Rating Downgrade)
items.zh_title: FTHI：對於將收益置於一切之上的投資者（評級下調）
items.zh_point: 富田投資（FTHI）評級下調，可能對投資收益產生影響。

items.title: US and Iran conclude high-level talks in Switzerland, mediators say
items.zh_title: 美國和伊朗在瑞士結束高級會談，中間人表示
items.zh_point: 美國和伊朗在瑞士進行高級會談，中間人表示雙方已經進行了溝通，會談的具體內容尚未公佈。

items.title: Taiwan to stage five days of combat readiness drills
items.zh_title: 台灣將進行五天的戰鬥準備演習
items.zh_point: 台灣軍方將進行五天的戰鬥準備演習，預計於未來某個時間點進行，具體時間尚未公布。

items.title: Stocks rally in Asia as Iran cites progress in talks
items.zh_title: 亞洲股市反彈　伊朗稱談判取得進展
items.zh_point: 伊朗表示與其他國家的談判取得進展，亞洲股市因此反彈，股價上漲。

items.title: Shipping slows after Iran says it has again shut the Strait of Hormuz
items.zh_title: 伊朗再次封鎖霍爾木茲海峽，全球航運遲緩
items.zh_point: 伊朗宣布再次封鎖霍爾木茲海峽，全球航運受到影響，可能引發全球油價上漲和供應鏈混亂。

items.title: Dollar firms as cracks emerge in peace deal, pound dips on Starmer uncertainty
items.zh_title: 美元穩固，和平協議裂縫出現，英鎊因斯塔默不確定而下跌
items.zh_point: 美元在和平協議裂縫出現的情況下穩固，英鎊因斯塔默領導人地位不確定而下跌。
